panel.title: Turkish President Erdogan says Israel’s attacks on Syria and Lebanon have reached a level that threa
panel.meta: Turkish President Erdogan says Israel’s attacks on Syria and Lebanon have reached a level that threatens Turkey. Erdogan accused Israel of “provocative actions” in the Mediterranean, warning that no one should pursue “adventurism” there. He said Israel’s aggression threatens global security and must be stopped, adding that if the rights of Turks and Turkish Cypriots in the Eastern Mediterranean are infringed, Turkey will respond “clearly and forcefully.” https://israelpalestine.liveuamap.com/en/2026/10-june-10-turkish-president-erdogan-says-israels-attacks
